name: TedsWoodworking
price: from ~$67 (often discounted on the official page)
pros: 16,000+ ready-made woodworking plans with step-by-step diagrams
Evergreen, beginner-friendly niche with a large audience
Backed by ClickBank's standard 60-day money-back guarantee
Top ClickBank seller for 10+ years (proven funnel)
cons: Plans are digital (downloads), not physical books
Some upsells presented after purchase
Best results require a basic tool set to follow along
summary: A large digital library of woodworking plans aimed at hobbyists who want clear, step-by-step blueprints for furniture, sheds, and DIY projects.
best_for: DIY and woodworking hobbyists who want ready-to-build plans instead of designing from scratch

name: ProDentim
pros: One of the top-converting offers in the dental niche
Probiotic chewable format (easy to take)
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
High average order value = larger commissions per sale
cons: A dietary supplement, not a medical treatment — results vary by person
Marketing claims are the vendor's and are not independently verified
Best value requires buying multi-bottle bundles
summary: An oral-health probiotic supplement marketed for supporting teeth and gum health. Popular, high-converting offer in the dental category.
best_for: people interested in oral-health supplements who prefer a chewable probiotic

name: Joint Genesis
pros: Established offer in the large joint-health market (40+ audience)
High average order value per sale
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
No vendor approval required to promote
cons: Lower recent EPC — match it to the right audience to convert
Supplement, not a medical product — individual results vary
Vendor health claims are not independently verified
summary: A joint-support supplement marketed toward older adults looking to support mobility and joint comfort.
best_for: an audience of adults 40+ interested in joint comfort and mobility

name: Gluco6
pros: Large, evergreen blood-sugar / metabolic-health niche
High average order value per conversion
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
Open to all affiliates (no approval)
cons: Health/YMYL niche — write carefully and avoid medical claims
Supplement, not a treatment — results vary
Vendor claims are not independently verified
summary: A blood-sugar / metabolic-support supplement aimed at adults interested in healthy glucose levels and energy.
best_for: adults interested in metabolic and healthy blood-sugar support supplements

name: Audifort
pros: Liquid-dropper format in the growing hearing-support niche
High average order value = strong commission per sale
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
No approval required to start promoting
cons: Supplement, not a medical device or treatment — results vary
Health/YMYL niche — keep copy factual and compliant
Vendor claims are not independently verified
summary: A liquid supplement marketed for supporting hearing and cognitive sharpness in older adults.
best_for: older adults interested in hearing- and brain-support supplements

name: Moon Reading
pros: Low-priced, easy-yes offer (good entry conversions)
Trends well on social platforms (TikTok/IG audiences)
Personalized interactive video reading (high engagement)
Broad mass-market appeal in the astrology niche
cons: Lower price = smaller commission per sale than supplements
Entertainment product — set audience expectations honestly
Conversions depend heavily on the right (astrology-curious) audience
summary: A personalized astrology 'moon reading' that generates an interactive video based on the user's birth details. A low-ticket, mass-appeal offer that converts well from social traffic.
best_for: an astrology- and self-discovery-curious audience, especially from social media

name: Energy Revolution System
price: low-ticket (often discounted on the official page)
pros: Strong conversion rate (1.55%) and EPC for a low-ticket offer
Evergreen DIY / energy-savings niche that's easy to write about
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
No approval required to promote
cons: Digital guide, not a physical product
Claims of savings vary by household — keep copy realistic
Upsells after the main purchase
summary: A DIY guide marketed around building a low-cost home power / energy-savings system. Strong converter in the green-living and preparedness space.

name: Water Freedom System
pros: High conversion rate (1.95%) and over $1 EPC
Evergreen survival / preparedness niche with passionate buyers
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
Up to 90% commissions on front and back end
cons: Digital guide format
Niche-specific — best for a survival/prepper audience
Post-purchase upsells
summary: A survival guide focused on producing drinkable water off-grid. Popular in the preparedness niche with strong conversions.

name: Soulmate Sketch
pros: Excellent conversion rate (2.61%) and high EPC ($1.83)
Mass-appeal novelty offer that performs on social traffic
Pairs naturally with astrology content (e.g. Moon Reading)
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
cons: Entertainment/novelty product — present it honestly
Tested heavily on paid traffic; organic results depend on audience fit
Upsells after the initial purchase
summary: A novelty service that creates a 'sketch' of the customer's soulmate. A high-converting, mass-appeal offer in the relationships/psychic niche.
best_for: an astrology- and relationship-curious social audience
keywords: what does my soulmate look like

name: The Genius Switch
pros: Standout conversion rate (7.82%) and very high EPC ($4.03) at time of check
Self-improvement / manifestation niche with broad appeal
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
No approval required
cons: Audio 'manifestation' product — keep claims modest and honest
Headline stats can fluctuate; re-check before scaling spend
Post-purchase upsells
summary: An audio-based self-improvement / manifestation program from the team behind The Genius Wave. Was converting exceptionally well at the time of research.

name: ProstaVive
pros: Strong, established offer in the large men's-health market
High average order value per sale
60-day money-back guarantee via ClickBank
No approval required to promote
cons: Supplement, not a medical treatment — results vary
Health/YMYL niche — keep copy factual and compliant
Vendor claims are not independently verified
summary: A prostate-support supplement aimed at men interested in prostate and urinary health. A high-AOV, top-converting men's-health offer.
best_for: men 40+ interested in prostate- and men's-health support supplements
